'''zaloto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:raajmahal|raajmahal]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:raajmahal|raajmahal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zaloto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæleteth|zæleteth]] || [[word:zæletej|zæletej]] || [[word:zæletesh|zæletesh]] || [[word:zælete|zælete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zalolototh|zalolototh]] || [[word:zalolotoj|zalolotoj]] || [[word:zalolotosh|zalolotosh]] || [[word:zaloloto|zaloloto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zalototh|zalototh]] || [[word:zalotoj|zalotoj]] || [[word:zalotosh|zalotosh]] || [[word:zaloto|zaloto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zaloftoth|zaloftoth]] || [[word:zaloftoj|zaloftoj]] || [[word:zaloftosh|zaloftosh]] || [[word:zaloftof|zaloftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zalototho|zalototho]] || [[word:zalotojo|zalotojo]] || [[word:zalotosho|zalotosho]] || [[word:zalotoko|zalotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zalototh|zalototh]] || [[word:zalotoj|zalotoj]] || [[word:zalotosh|zalotosh]] || [[word:zaloto|zaloto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zalotothol|zalotothol]] || [[word:zalotojol|zalotojol]] || [[word:zalotoshol|zalotoshol]] || [[word:zalotokol|zalotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zalotothotho|zalotothotho]] || [[word:zalotojojo|zalotojojo]] || [[word:zalotoshosho|zalotoshosho]] || [[word:zalotoko|zalotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zalotothon|zalotothon]] || [[word:zalotojon|zalotojon]] || [[word:zalotoshon|zalotoshon]] || [[word:zalotokon|zalotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zalotothoro|zalotothoro]] || [[word:zalotojoro|zalotojoro]] || [[word:zalotoshoro|zalotoshoro]] || [[word:zalotokoro|zalotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
